rationale: For Portugal, the main indirect concern remains energy prices tied to the Iran deal outcome; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran deal keeps global oil and gas prices volatile, indirectly affecting Portuguese energy bills and cost of living.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate
top_events.summary: EU-wide discussion on new migration rules has some relevance for Portugal as an Atlantic entry point, though no immediate policy change is imminent.

top_events.title: Anthropic AI tools suspended over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US federal AI policy shift has minimal direct impact on Portuguese residents; noted as background tech-policy development with no near-term local effect.
